query:
SELECT questionId, COUNT(*) as count
FROM intakeResponses
WHERE organizationId = (SELECT id FROM organizations WHERE slug = 'radone-munson' LIMIT 1)
GROUP BY questionId
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY count DESC
LIMIT 20;
